nodes.speaker: npc_blacksmith
nodes.text: Need some steel, traveler? I've been working the forge all day.

nodes.speaker: npc_blacksmith
nodes.text: I'm forging a blade strong enough to pierce the walls of the Laboratory.

nodes.speaker: hero
nodes.text: The Laboratory? What is that place?

nodes.speaker: npc_blacksmith
nodes.text: A cursed ruin of glass and metal. Stay far from it.

nodes.speaker: npc_baker
nodes.text: Fresh bread! Smells better than the dungeon, doesn't it?

nodes.speaker: npc_knight
nodes.text: Hail, traveler. I am on a quest to reach the Celestial Realm.

choices.text: Is it true it's above the clouds?

nodes.speaker: npc_knight
nodes.text: Indeed. But one must first survive the Hellish Abyss to prove their worth.
